title: stelis drewii
intro: Stelis drewii, also known as the orchid of the Andes, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Stelis drewii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy for various ailments in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Stelis drewii can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
